blocks.body:
**Pleasur AI takes privacy seriously.** We're building with security-first practices informed by the failures of our competitors. [Learn more about our approach](https://pleasur.ai) or [try it free](https://pleasur.ai).

---

## FAQ

**Have any major AI girlfriend apps been hacked?**
Yes. In 2025, two apps leaked 43 million messages and 600,000 photos. In 2026, another breach exposed 300 million messages from 25 million users. These are the known incidents.

**Does my AI girlfriend app sell my data?**
Many apps share data with third parties for advertising and analytics. Check the privacy policy for "third-party sharing" sections. If the app is free, your data is likely part of the business model.

**Can AI girlfriend apps see my conversations?**
In most cases, yes. Your conversations are stored on the platform's servers. Some platforms may use conversation data for model training. Look for explicit commitments about employee access to conversation data.

**Is Replika safe to use?**
Replika is among the safer options due to its scale and public accountability. It offers data export and deletion. However, no platform guarantees perfect privacy.

**How do I delete my data from an AI girlfriend app?**
Most platforms have account deletion options in settings. Under GDPR, you can also submit a formal data deletion request. Keep records of your request and follow up if data isn't deleted within the legally required timeframe (typically 30 days under GDPR).
